title: (patch): remove a stale IDE config from the codebase root
author: Circuit-Overtime

gist.headline: Sweeping up the IDE dust
gist.blurb: Swept away some leftover IDE configuration files to keep the repository root sparkling clean.
gist.summary: Removed a stale `.codemap-state.json` IDE configuration file from the repository root.
gist.impact: Keeps the codebase clean and prevents clutter for developers working in the repository.
gist.visual_concept: The Nomnom creature eating a stale, dusty old configuration file while Polly the bee holds a tiny broom, representing repository cleanup.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the round tan Nomnom creature happily eating a dusty old computer file while the cute bee mascot watches amused, holding a tiny broom. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like A Short Hike.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the round tan Nomnom creature happily eating a dusty old computer file while the cute bee mascot watches amused, holding a tiny broom. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like A Short Hike.
